## Article Ideas

- **Gemini CLI Sunset Timeline:** Multiple sources confirm Gemini CLI deprecation
  on June 18, 2026, across AI Pro, AI Ultra, and free tiers. A comparison
  article on migration strategies would be valuable for the target audience.
- **Antigravity vs Competitive Positioning:** Nyndra AI's analysis and Matt Kuda's
  build walkthrough both frame Antigravity 2.0 as a direct Codex and Claude Code
  competitor. Could expand into a competitive analysis article.
- **Multi-Agent Teams in Practice:** The official Beginner's Guide highlights
  multi-agent teams as a core differentiator. Potential article on agent
  orchestration patterns.
- **Antigravity CLI vs Desktop App:** Multiple videos distinguish between the
  terminal CLI and standalone desktop application. A guide comparing use cases
  would serve the target audience well.

## 2026-05-21 Scheduled Discovery

### [Google’s AntiGravity 2.0 Just Dropped, and…](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=r5ZPO_O1ql4)

- **Channel:** Jack Roberts
- **Duration:** 13:17
- **Published:** 2026-05-20
- **Relevance:** 4/5
- **Comments:** 10 extracted

**Summary:** Launch-week commentary on the Antigravity 2.0 update and its
impact on existing developer workflows.
The extracted comments are more valuable than the sparse description.

**Comment signal:** Strong negative sentiment around quota exhaustion,
settings loss, plugins, skills, project context, and the forced move away from
the previous IDE workflow.

### [Antigravity 2.0 UPDATE: NEW Agentic AI Coding Agent + Gemini Desktop App!](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=msd_APlIsRk)

- **Channel:** WorldofAI
- **Duration:** 11:15
- **Published:** 2026-05-21
- **Relevance:** 3/5
- **Comments:** 6 extracted

**Summary:** Broad update video on Antigravity 2.0 as an agentic coding app and
Gemini desktop experience.
Most description and comment content is promotional rather than technical.

**Comment signal:** Useful complaints focus on low limits and frustration that
the coding app no longer exposes code in the way some users expected.

### [Where Did My Terminal Go? Antigravity 2.0 Explained](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gCcKFUdcTsI)

- **Channel:** Kevin Farugia AI Automation

- **Published:** 2026-05-20
- **Relevance:** 4/5
- **Comments:** 10 extracted

and changed Antigravity 2.0 interface.
The signal is directly tied to developer workflow recovery after the update.

**Comment signal:** Comments repeatedly mention lost chats, extensions,
project state, missing IDE affordances, worse Flash quotas, and requests for
shortcut or navigation guidance.
